title: A0 - External protection device activated
summary: Fault code A0 indicates that an external protection device has been activated.

title: A1 - Indoor unit PCB fault
summary: Fault code A1 indicates a problem with the indoor unit PCB.

title: A3 - Abnormal condensate water level
summary: Fault code A3 indicates an abnormal condensate water level.

title: A6 - Fan motor locked, overload, overcurrent, or stalled
summary: Fault code A6 indicates the fan motor is locked, overloaded, overcurrent, or stalled.

structured_payload.meaning: 风扇马达锁住、过载或过电流、堵转

evidence_quote: A6风扇马达锁住、过载或过电流、堵转

title: A7 - Swing motor fault
summary: Fault code A7 indicates a fault with the swing motor.

title: A9 - Electronic expansion valve fault
summary: Fault code A9 indicates a fault with the electronic expansion valve.

title: AF - Humidifier abnormal
summary: Fault code AF indicates an abnormality with the humidifier.

title: AJ - Capacity setting error
summary: Fault code AJ indicates an error in capacity setting.

title: C4 - Liquid pipe thermistor abnormal
summary: Fault code C4 indicates an abnormality with the liquid pipe thermistor (poor contact, disconnection, short circuit, defective).

structured_payload.meaning: 液管用热敏电阻异常（接触不良、断线、短路、不良）

evidence_quote: C4液管用热敏电阻异常（接触不良、断线、短路、不良）

title: C5 - Gas pipe thermistor abnormal
summary: Fault code C5 indicates an abnormality with the gas pipe thermistor (poor contact, disconnection, short circuit, defective).

structured_payload.meaning: 气管用热敏电阻异常（接触不良、断线、短路、不良）

evidence_quote: C5气管用热敏电阻异常（接触不良、断线、短路、不良）

title: C9 - Suction air thermistor abnormal
summary: Fault code C9 indicates an abnormality with the suction air thermistor (poor contact, disconnection, short circuit, defective).

structured_payload.meaning: 吸入空气热敏电阻异常（接触不良、断线、短路、不良）

evidence_quote: C9吸入空气热敏电阻异常（接触不良、断线、短路、不良）

title: CJ - Remote controller sensor abnormal
summary: Fault code CJ indicates an abnormality with the remote controller sensor.

title: E0 - Protection device activated
summary: Fault code E0 indicates that a protection device has been activated.

title: E1 - PCB ASSY defective
summary: Fault code E1 indicates a defective PCB assembly.

title: E3 - High pressure switch activated
summary: Fault code E3 indicates that the high pressure switch has been activated.
